_comment: TEMPLATE - copy to config/ffc-registrant-contact.json and fill in the TODO address fields before any registrar flow consumes it. Incomplete address values would be rejected by (or publish wrong WHOIS data to) the registrar, so the real file is intentionally not committed until complete. PUBLIC registrant contact for Free For Charity (umbrella owner). PUBLIC INFORMATION ONLY: every value here is intended to be publicly visible (it matches FFC's public 501(c)(3) record) and is the WHOIS registrant for FFC-owned charity domains. Do NOT put any individual charity's private contact details here - those live only in WHMCS (see scripts/whmcs-client-add.ps1 / whmcs-contact-add.ps1). This registrant is independent of WHMCS client records.

address.street1: TODO: FFC public North Carolina street address (from public 501(c)(3) record)
